steps.title: Login
steps.intro: Use this button to log in and access your downloads and favorites.

steps.title: Imagery
steps.intro: You can customize your map with the Imagery menu.

steps.title: Navigation Menu
steps.intro: In this section, you can see the selected product.

steps.title: Product
steps.intro: In this section, you can see the selected product.

steps.title: Product
steps.intro: Browse through the product catalog using this menu.

steps.title: Product
steps.intro: Products are categorized by topic in the Explore tab...

steps.title: Product
steps.intro: ... and by source in the Satellite tab.

steps.title: Time Frame
steps.intro: In this section, you can see the selected month.

steps.title: Time Frame
steps.intro: Use the arrows to select a month of your choosing.

steps.title: Location
steps.intro: In this section, you can see the selected place.

steps.title: Location
steps.intro: You can select different NUTS levels by zooming in and out on the map.

steps.title: Location
steps.intro: You can also select a location using the search bar.

steps.title: Location
steps.intro: And you can draw your custom area using the polygon tool.

steps.title: Download the provided artifact
steps.intro: Download your GeoTIFFs and GeoJSON using this download button.

steps.title: Upload custom areas
steps.intro: And if you want to use a GeoJSON of your own, click on the upload button.

steps.title: Log In
steps.intro: Remember: Download, upload and favorites list features are only available for logged in users.

steps.title: See you soon!
steps.intro: If you want to take the tour again, just click the Info button and then select Tour Interface.
